keySetup.title: Kiin gadii kee qopheessi

keySetup.imported: Kiin private gara gaditti kanaa fidame. Ergii duruu amma dubbisuu dandeessa.

auth.headline: Ergaa fiicamaa namni kamiyyuu, bakka kamiyyuu
auth.description: End-to-end encryption, 100+ afaanotaatti hiikuu, ergii haa dhabatu fi yaada/ video yaada.

feature.privacy: Privacy jalqabaa. Daataa kee, fiicuu kee.

hero.line1: Ergaa fiicamaa namni kamiyyuu, bakka kamiyyuu — waliin
hero.sub: Lakkoofsa bilisaa fiicamaa argadhuu yaada fi ergii addunyaa hunda Wi-Fi ykn daataa irratti. End-to-end encryption, ergii haa dhabatu fi HD voice/video yaada argadhuu — waliin tooftaa keessatti bu'u kan walitti dhufe akkaataa daangaa keessatti.
hero.freeNote: Yaada fi ergii jalqabaa bilisaa. AI fi features premium haalaan upgrade barbaadu.

feat.translate: Harka qabuu afaanotaatti walitti dhufe keessan keessatti
feat.privacy: Privacy jalqabaa. Daataa kee, fiicuu kee.

auth.desktopTip: Desktop irratti? Bilbila kee waliin scan gochuun app argadhu.
auth.scanHelper: Desktop irratti? Bilbila kee waliin scan gochuun app argadhu.
auth.subhead: Ergaa fiicamaa, encrypted fi hiikame — daqiiqaa jalqabaa.
auth.tip: Tip: Galmee tokkoo web fi mobile irratti fayyadami. Ergaa kee synced ta'a.
auth.scanHint: App gadi bu'uuf ykn browser keessatti banaa scan gochuun.

registration.passwordDescription: Yeroo jalqabaa 6 arfii. Paaswerd cimaa, addaa fayyadami.
registration.smsConsent: Galmee uumuun, SMS notifications Chatforia kee waliin walitti dhufe (ergii fayyadamtootaa biraa) argachuuf walii galte. Ergaa fi daataa gatiin jiraachuu danda'a. Yeroo hunda Settings keessatti opt out gochuu dandeessa.

auth.enterValidRecipient: Maqaa contact saved ykn lakkoofsa bilbilaa galchi.
auth.sendFailed: Ergaa dhiisu hin danda'anne. Console ilaali.

chat.selectPrompt: Ergaa ykn chat room filadhuu chat jalqabuuf

chat.blockError: Target user block gochuuf hin danda'anne.

messageInput.nothingToSend: Ergaa barreessi ykn faayilii attach gochuun erguu.

errors.validation: Dogoggora validation. Ergaa kee ilaali fi yaali.
errors.failedToSend: Erguu dhiisuu. Bubble dhiisuu deebifuu dandeessa.

contactList.couldNotStart: Chat jalqabuu hin danda'anne. Deebifuu yaali.

profile.title: Profile Fayyadamtootaa
profile.showOriginalAndTranslation: Ergaa original fi translation waliin ilaali
profile.noPrivateKey: Kiin private gadget kana irratti hin jiru export gochuuf.
profile.setBackupPassword: Paaswerd set gochuun backup kee encrypt:
profile.importFailed: Kii fiduu dhiisuu (paaswerd dogoggora ykn faayilii corrupt).
profile.keysRotated: Kiin haaraa uumame fi public key olkaa'ame.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Kiin private kee gadget kana hin baatu. Copy password-protected export gochuun gadget biraa irratti deebifuu dandeessa.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Free irratti jirta—Sun/Moon options jalqabaa fayyadami. Themes hedduu unlock gochuuf upgrade.
profile.backupDesc: Kii encryption kee backup gochuun ergaa kee gadget biraa irratti akkaataa fiicuu dandeessu.
profile.freePlanCopy: Free plan irratti jirta. Features hedduu unlock gochuuf upgrade (backups, lakkoofsa extra, privacy advanced).
profile.portalOpenFailed: Billing portal bana hin danda'anne. Deebifuu yaali.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Ergaa koo kopii ta'e yoo na beeksiisi
profile.followHint: Ergaa isaan Followers (ykn Public) audience waliin post yoo, Following feed keessatti agarsiifamu.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Yaada fi ergaa incoming gara bilbila ykn email verified kee forward. Yaada/ergaa outgoing Chatforia lakkoofsa kee agarsiisuu danda'a.
profile.ageBandHint: Age range qofa (guyyaa dhaloota exact hin qabnu). Random Chat pairings akkaataa fiicuu barbaada.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Age-based matching Random Chat keessatti fayyadami
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Yeroo on ta'e, namoota age ranges walitti dhufe waliin walitti dhufe yaali.
profile.partnerAgeBands: Namoota kam waliin walitti dhufe dandeessa?
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Teens yeroo hunda teens biraa waliin qofa walitti dhufe. Adults teens waliin hin walitti dhufe.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Safetyaf, 13–17 age range accounts Random Chat keessatti 13–17 accounts qofa waliin walitti dhufe.
profile.foriaRemember: Ria yaadachiisi yaada kee ishee haasa'u
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Yeroo on ta'e, Foria Random Chat keessatti walitti dhufe kee duraa (si waliin qofa) fayyadamuun walitti dhufe itti fufu. Yeroo hunda off gochuu dandeessa.
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Audio greeting kee yeroo hin jiru fayyadama.
profile.voicemailNote: Voicemail Chatforia lakkoofsa kee irraa Voicemail inbox keessatti olkaa'ama. Transcription fi forwarding plans deeggaramoo keessatti dandeessisuu dandeessa.
profile.portHint: Lakkoofsa amma kee qabuu barbaadaa? Chatforia Wireless keessatti port gochuu dandeessa.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.desc: Wi-Fi irraa fageenyatti Chatforia daataa mobile argadhu.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Plan mobile Chatforia kee, lakkoofsa, forwarding fi number porting manage.

options.heading: Chatforia akkaataa fayyadamuu barbaadu filadhu
options.subheading: Lakkoofsa Chatforia haaraa argachuu ykn lakkoofsa amma kee carrier biraa irraa fiduu dandeessa.
options.portNumber: Lakkoofsa amma kee Chatforia Wireless keessatti port

port.heading: Lakkoofsa amma kee port
port.subheading: Lakkoofsa bilbilaa amma kee carrier amma kee irraa Chatforia keessatti siiqsi. Details carrier account kee waliin walitti dhufe akkaataa delays hin taane.
port.success: Port request submitted! Updates siif kennina.

status.heading: Porting status
status.subheading: Lakkoofsa port requests kee track gochuun.

wireless.exhausted: Daataa kee dhabame. Pack haaraa bituu daataa mobile itti fufuuf.

error.invite: Invite uumuu hin danda'anne. Family owner ta'uu qabda fi deebifuu yaali.
error.checkout: Family plan checkout jalqabuu hin danda'anne. Deebifuu yaali.

billing.freePlanCopy: Free plan irratti jirta. Features hedduu unlock gochuuf upgrade.
billing.portalError: Billing portal bana hin danda'anne amma.
billing.cancelNowHelp: Subscription kee billing portal keessatti manage ykn dhiisi, ykn amma dhiisi.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Plan kee amma dhiisuu barbaadaa? Kun hin deebi'u.
billing.cancelNowError: Plan kee amma dhiisuu hin danda'anne. Deebifuu yaali ykn Manage billing fayyadami.

none.title: Family hin qabu amma
none.body: Chatforia Family fi shared data pool uumuuf, Family plan jalqabi.

data.heading: Shared data pool
data.caption: Members hundi pool kana walitti qabata. Limit kee dhihaachuu yoo si beeksiifna.

invite.title: Member haaraa invite
invite.body: Email ykn link erguun shared family data pool keessatti namoota invite.
invite.expiryHint: Link kun guyyaa hedduu booda expires. Yeroo hunda haaraa uumuu dandeessa.

join.title: Family galuu
join.body: Chatforia Family fi shared data pool isaanii galuuf invite ta'e.
join.success: Family kana galte. Pool daataa isaanii amma walitti qabatta.
join.error: Family kana keessatti si add gochuu hin danda'anne. Invite invalid ykn expired ta'uu danda'a.

premium.heading: Premium galuu
premium.description: Features power unlock & ads haala qabu.

upgrade.title: Haalaan
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Free, ad-supported plan jalqabi. Plus waliin ad-free gochuu ykn Premium waliin features power hunda unlock.
upgrade.subtitle: App plan filadhu, data packs ofii kee add ykn family kee waliin data pool share — bakka tokko irraa.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Free, ad-supported plan jalqabi. Plus waliin ad-free gochuu ykn Premium waliin features power hunda unlock.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Global eSIM data add gochuun Wi-Fi irraa fageenyatti Chatforia itti fufu.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Shared data pool family kee uumuun usage hunda manage bakka tokko irraa.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Features power unlock & ads haala qabu.

free.title: Free
free.desc: Ergaa bilisaa jalqabi. Chatforia jalqabaa yaaluuf mijataa.

features.chat: Real-time 1:1 fi group chat, voice fi video yaada
features.media: Foto, voice messages fi video gabaabaa share
features.ai: AI-powered smart replies fi instant translation (fair use)
features.disappearing: Ergaa haa dhabatu fi privacy controls jalqabaa
features.ads: Free yeroo hunda ads waliin app keessatti

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Essentials hunda, ads malee. Ergaa fi yaada guyyaa hundaaf mijataa.

features.forwarding: Yaada fi ergaa bilbila amma kee gara forward

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Monthly)
premiumMonthly.desc: Chatforia experience guutuu: AI power tools, customization fi priority support.

features.themes: Premium color themes fi app customizations hunda unlock
features.ai: Premium-only AI power tools rewrites, smart replies fi summaries

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Annual)
premiumAnnual.desc: Yearly billed yeroo hedduu olkaa'i — extra color themes, AI tools fi priority support waliin.

features.allPremium: Premium Monthly keessatti hunda — extra color themes waliin
features.bestFor: Power users, remote workers fi travelers guddaa

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: 30% olkaa'i annual waliin – galuu itti fufi
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Billed upfront. Yeroo hunda dhiisi. Fees dhokataa hin jiru.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Features guutuu, ringtones fi AI power tools.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Billed upfront. Yeroo hunda dhiisi. Fees dhokataa hin jiru.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Global data add gochuun Wi-Fi malee Chatforia itti fufu. Gatiin country fi currency kee irratti adjust ta'a.
mobile.subtitle.detail: One-time global data pack filadhuu yeroo travel ykn Wi-Fi irraa fageenyatti Chatforia itti fufu.
mobile.note: 3 GB jalaa data packs hin gurgurru.

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs eSIM-compatible fi unlocked device barbaadu. Phone model, carrier fi country irratti availability gara gara. Coverage fi saffisaan region irratti gara gara.

small.title: Starter pack
small.desc: 3 GB daataa saffisaa — light messaging fi yaada gabaabaa
small.bestFor: Trips gabaabaa, light messaging fi yaada gabaabaa

medium.title: Traveler pack
medium.desc: 5 GB daataa saffisaa trips, commuting fi VoIP yaada guyyaa hunda
medium.bestFor: Weekend trips, VoIP yaada guyyaa hunda fi maps

large.title: Power pack
large.desc: 10 GB daataa saffisaa heavy chat, yaada fi video Chatforia network irratti
large.bestFor: Heavy chat, yaada, video fi hotspot use
large.aria: Power user eSIM data pack bituu

compare.title: eSIM data packs walitti dhufe
compare.disclaimer: Daataa usage actual Chatforia (voice, video, media fi apps biraa phone irratti) irratti hunda.

family.title: Chatforia Family (shared data)
family.subtitle: Shared data pool tokko family kee keessatti share. Bill tokko, Chatforia accounts hedduu, global coverage.

small.title: Family Small
small.desc: 20 GB shared daataa saffisaa — 2–3 light users

medium.title: Family Medium
medium.desc: 40 GB shared daataa saffisaa — 3–5 active members

large.title: Family Large
large.desc: 80 GB shared daataa saffisaa — power families yeroo hunda online

feature.fairUse: Fair-use policy fi local limits irratti hunda

family.disclaimer: Family packs shared data pool uumu ykn top up. Members invite fi remove yeroo hunda dandeessa.
family.footnote: Family packs shared data pool tokko Chatforia accounts walitti dhufe keessatti. Availability fi limits country fi local regulations irratti hunda.

why.title: Namootni Chatforia gara maaliif jijjiiruu
why.subtitle: Chatforia lakkoofsa bilbilaa amma, smart translation fi ad-free gara deebi'uu karaa ifa ta'e kenniti.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Ads xiqqaa Free irratti, Plus upgrade salphaa yeroo barbaadu, fi Premium tools TextNow hin qabu.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: App modern, global-first design fi built-in translation call forwarding durii malee.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Lakkoofsa bilbilaa amma erguu — app users qofa malee — AI fi status waliin. TextFree ykn TextMe irraa dhufe yoo ta'e mijataa.

why.disclaimer: Comparison publicly available information irratti hunda fi yeroo gara gara ta'uu danda'a. Free-texting apps biraa TextFree ykn TextMe TextNow waliin walitti dhufe.

free.a: Eeyyee. Free plan Chatforia lakkoofsa, yaada fi ergaa ads waliin qaba. Free yeroo hunda taa'uu dandeessa ykn ads haala qabu fi features hedduu unlock gochuuf upgrade.

plusPremium.q: Plus fi Premium gidduu maal garaagara?
plusPremium.a: Plus ads haala qabu fi ergaa history dheeressaa — guyyaa hundaaf mijataa. Premium customization extra, AI tools rewrites fi replies, priority support heavy users.

esim.a: Chatforia Mobile global eSIM coverage fayyadama. Availability country fi device kee irratti hunda. Activation app keessatti options deeggaramoo agarsiifama.

cancel.q: Plans yeroo hunda dhiisuu ykn jijjiiruu dandeessa?
cancel.a: Eeyyee. Subscription kee app keessatti billing page irraa manage ykn dhiisi. Jijjiiramni period billing amma kee dhuma irratti hojjechuu.

family.a: Family packs shared data pool Chatforia accounts hedduu keessatti uumu. Namni tokko bill pay, members invite/remove fi limits per person set gochuu dandeessa.

gettingStarted.title: Jalqabuu
gettingStarted.subtitle: Chatforia haaraa? Quick start kun essentials agarsiisa daqiiqaa jalqabaa keessatti productive ta'uu dandeessu.

alert.text: Guide kun features haaraa launch yeroo hedduu guddata. Wanti dhabame yoo ta'e, nu beeksiisi via

section2.title: 2) Ergaa jalqabi
section2.item1: DM ykn Group uumuun ergaa jalqabaa erguu.
section2.item2: Instant translation fayyadamuun 100+ afaanotaatti walitti dhufe.
section2.item3: Ergaa haa dhabatu fi read receipts Profile → Privacy keessatti yaali.

section3.title: 3) Gara fuulduraa
section3.item1: Paid plan yeroo hunda app keessatti upgrade dandeessa.
section3.item2: Yeroo galte booda, gadgets adda link gochuu fi encrypted backups Settings app keessatti qopheessuu dandeessa.

account.a: App ykn web gadi bu'u, “Create account” tuqi, email/bilbila verify. Deebifuu, “Forgot password” fayyadami.

privacy.a: Eeyyee. Ergaa fi yaada end-to-end encrypted akkaataa jalqabaa. Si fi recipient qofa dubbisuu danda'a.

translate.a: Settings → Appearance & Language keessatti “Auto-translate” dandeessisi. Device irratti deeggarame yeroo hojjechuu, ykn secure APIs waliin metadata xiqqaa.

contact.a: support@chatforia.com irratti nu qunnami. Screenshots fi app version kee qabu.

contact.title: Nu qunnami
contact.errorSend: Erguu hin danda'anne. support@chatforia.com email gochuun.

intro.body: Privacy Policy kun Chatforia (“we”, “us”) akkaataa daataa app fi services keessatti collect, use fi share gochuu ibsa. Chatforia daataa keenya access danda'u minimize gochuuf design ta'e.

infoWeCollect.title: Daataa keenya collect
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (email/bilbila) galmee uumuuf fi fiicuu.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (ergaa/yaada) end-to-end encrypted; hin dubbisnu.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage crash logs, device type ykn coarse analytics performance fooyyessuuf.

sms.title: Lakkoofsa bilbilaa mobile fi SMS
sms.body: Lakkoofsa bilbilaa mobile kennuu yoo filatte, account verification, login alerts fi user-to-user messaging SMS waliin deeggarame fayyadamuu. Transactional SMS messages account fi activity Chatforia keessatti erguu dandeessa. Yeroo hunda SMS opt out gochuu dandeessa “STOP” ykn Settings keessatti notification preferences jijjiiruun. Lakkoofsa bilbilaa kee hin gurgurru ykn marketing unrelated hin fayyadamnu.

howWeUse.title: Daataa akkaataa fayyadamuu
howWeUse.provide: Service fiicuu fi fiicuu (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: Daataa personal hin gurgurru. Processors waliin daataa xiqqaa (push notifications, analytics) strict contracts waliin share gochuu dandeessa.

rights.title: Mirga kee
rights.body: Region kee irratti (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), access, correction, deletion ykn opt-out processing barbaachisuu dandeessa. privacy@chatforia.com qunnami.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: Service itti fufuuf barbaachisaa qofa retain. E2E content keenya hin decryptamne.

children.title: Daa'imman
children.body: Chatforia daa'imman 13 jalaa (ykn local law kee irratti) hin qabu.

changes.title: Jijjiiramni
changes.body: Updates kanas post gochuun “Last updated” date haaromfina.

contact.title: Qunnami
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Chatforia fayyadamuun Terms kana walii galte. Walii hin galin yoo ta'e, service hin fayyadamnu.

accounts.title: Galmee
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Info accurate kennuu fi credentials fiicuu.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Galmee kee irratti activity kee qabda.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Illegal, abusive ykn infringing content hin qabu; spam ykn automated abuse hin qabu.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: Lakkoofsa bilbilaa mobile kennuu yoo ta'e, Chatforia account fi service fayyadamuu waliin SMS messages erguu walii galte (login alerts, security notifications, ergaa walitti dhufe keessatti). SMS promotional ykn marketing explicit consent malee hin fayyadamnu. Message fi data rates standard jiraachuu danda'a. SMS opt out “STOP” ykn notification settings app keessatti jijjiiruun yeroo hunda dandeessa.

yourContent.title: Content kee
yourContent.body: Content kee mirga qabda. Service itti fufuuf mirga barbaachisaa nuuf kennita (routing, storage, translation).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Service “as is” warranties malee kennama. Law irratti danda'ame hunda, Chatforia indirect ykn consequential damages irratti hin liabne.

changes.title: Jijjiiramni
changes.body: Terms kun haaromfuu dandeessa; jijjiiramni booda itti fufuun acceptance ta'a.

contact.title: Qunnami
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Daataa Personal Koo hin gurgurru ykn share hin goonu
doNotSell.body: Chatforia daataa personal hin gurgurru. California residents CPRA jalatti requests submit gochuu dandeessa button jalaa fayyadamuun.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.body: Chatforia cookies xiqqaa fayyadama (session, security). Third-party ads cookies hin fayyadamnu. Cookies browser settings keessatti manage.

phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Lakkoofsa bilbilaa status laaduu hin danda'anne.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Lakkoofsa hin assign hin jiru. Area code filadhuu ergii jalqabuuf.

startChatModal.title: Chat jalqabi
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Maqaa, username, bilbila ykn email barreessi…
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Username ykn bilbila barreessi fi Search tuqi.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Phone/email entries save yeroo contacts ta'an argamu.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Recipients filatame waliin chat jalqabuu dhiisuu.

sounds.freeNotice: Free irratti jirta — premium tones agarsiifamaa jiru garuu locked. Hunda unlock gochuuf upgrade.

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.controlIntro: Hiikuu, smart replies fi ForiaBot auto-responses control gochuun.
aiSettings.showOriginalAlongside: Ergaa original fi translation waliin ilaali
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Ergaa duraa hedduu (sanitized) AI gara erguun quick replies yaada.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Yeroo on ta'e, AI suggestions flagged words masked ta'u.

accessibilitySettings.title: Accessibility & Alerts
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Options Chatforia sound malee fayyadamuu salphaa taasisuu.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Normal size irraa jalqaba. Text guddaa barbaadu yoo ta'e accessibility settings keessatti guddisuu.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Visual alerts ergaa & yaada
Banners fi title blink agarsiisi activity hin dhabne.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Ergaa haaraa irratti vibrate (deeggarame yeroo)
Notifications waliin device vibration trigger.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Yaada incoming irratti screen flash
Yaada ring yeroo brief bright flash.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Audio messages argatte irratti transcript attach.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Banners fi title blink agarsiisi activity hin dhabne.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Yaada ring yeroo brief bright flash.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Server irratti ciphertext qofa olkaa'i. AI/Translate fi moderation previews dhiisuu.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Alias, maqaa, username ykn bilbila barbaadi

peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Mobile irratti Chatforia iOS fi Android waliin walitti dhufe.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tip: Ergaa kee web fi mobile gidduutti synced ta'a.

randomChat.title: Random Chat
randomChat.description: Namoota haaraa daqiiqaa jalqabaa walitti dhufe. Chat anonymous jalqabaa. Yeroo mijataa ta'e Add Friend.
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Age range qofa olkaa'ina (guyyaa dhaloota exact hin qabnu). Random Chat pairings akkaataa fiicuu. Namoota (RiaBot qofa malee) waliin walitti dhufe, Settings → Age & Random Chat keessatti age band set gochuun.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Namoota waliin walitti dhufe, Profile → Age & Random Chat keessatti age range set.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Namoota (RiaBot qofa malee) waliin walitti dhufe, Settings → Age & Random Chat keessatti age band set.
randomChat.subtitle: Namoota haaraa daqiiqaa jalqabaa walitti dhufe ykn Ria waliin chat filadhu.
randomChat.setAge: Profile → Age & Random Chat keessatti age range set gochuun namoota waliin walitti dhufe.

forgot.title: Paaswerd hir'uu
forgot.helper: Email Chatforia account kee uumuuf fayyadame galchi fi link fiicamaa paaswerd reset erguuf.
forgot.genericError: Request process gochuu hin danda'anne. Yeroo xiqqaa booda deebifuu yaali.

login.ssoUnavailable: Single-sign-on amma hin jiru. Username & paaswerd fayyadami.

error.unprocessable: Request dogoggora. Username/email fi paaswerd kee ilaali.
error.deviceLimit: Free plan device limit dhaqqabe. Gaditti biraa galuu dhiisi ykn Premium upgrade gochuun gadgets hedduu link.

dialer.title: Yaada
dialer.subtitle: Keypad & recents. (PSTN hin fayyadamne yoo ta'e, conversation header irraa yaada jalqabi.)

video.title: Video
video.roomsDesc: Multi-party video room maqaa shared fayyadamuun.

direct.title: Direct Video
direct.subtitle: Bilbila ykn Chatforia username fayyadamuun 1:1 video yaada jalqabi.
direct.tipInvite: Tip: Lakkoofsa paste gochuun contact save malee yaada. Non-users link waliin invite.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Room uumu ykn maqaa tokko barreessuun existing join.
rooms.desc: Multi-party video room maqaa shared fayyadamuun.
rooms.tip: Tip: maqaa kana namoota waliin share, ykn deep link /video?room=room-name.

phoneWarning.title: Lakkoofsa kee yeroo gabaabaa keessatti expires
phoneWarning.body: Lakkoofsa kee {{number}} {{date}} irratti release ta'a unless reactivated.

support.heading: Akkaataa si gargaaru dandeessa?
support.contactIntro: Email irratti deebisa. Issue reproduce gochuuf details qabu.
support.sendError: Erguu hin danda'anne. support@chatforia.com email gochuun.

encryptionRecovery.title: Encryption Manage
encryptionRecovery.description: Kii encryption kee backup, restore, unlock ykn reset.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Browser kun ergaa encrypted kee decrypt gochuu hin danda'u amma. Kii kee restore, unlock ykn reset gochuun itti fufi.

unlockPasscode.label: Unlock passcode (gadget amma)
unlockPasscode.description: Kiin kee locally decrypt gochuuf yeroo export dura fayyadama

restoreBackupPassword.label: Paaswerd backup
restoreBackupPassword.description: Paaswerd iPhone irratti kii kee backup yeroo uumuuf uumte

newLocalPasscode.label: Paaswerd local haaraa
newLocalPasscode.description: Kiin rest irratti browser kana irratti fiicuuf

resetLocalPasscode.label: Paaswerd local haaraa
resetLocalPasscode.description: Reset dura barbaachisaa yoo kii haaraa gadget kana irratti fiifamu

errors.restoreIncomplete: Kii restore incomplete ykn account kanaaf dogoggora
errors.noBackup: Account kanaaf backup encrypted hin jiru
errors.missingPublicKey: Backup keessatti kiin public hin jiru
errors.noServerPublicKey: Account kun server public key hin qabu amma
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Server backup kii encryption account amma waliin hin walitti dhufe

confirm.reset: Account kanaaf encryption reset? Ergaa encrypted duruu deebifamuu danda'a unless kii original deebiftee.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Account keetiif kii encryption haaraa uuma. Ergaa encrypted duruu deebifamuu danda'a unless kii original deebiftee.

press.title: Press
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia app ergaa privacy jalqabaa afaan gara gara salphaa taasisuu. Ergaa end-to-end encrypted akkaataa jalqabaa, hiikuu built-in 100+ afaanota real time. Ergaa haa dhabatu dandeessisuu, read receipts optional gochuu fi gadgets gidduutti sync. iOS, Android fi web irratti argama.
press.scanTip: Desktop irratti? Bilbila kee waliin scan gochuun app argadhu.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: Team founding xiqqaa Chatforia uumaa jirra — messenger global private web, iOS fi Android irratti launch. Privacy, encryption fi user experiences mijataa irratti care yoo ta'e, si dhaggeeffachuu barbaanna.
careers.openRoles: Open founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Akkaataa apply: Button jalaa fayyadamuun resume fi links email.
careers.whyBullets:
• Foundation messenger global haaraa uumuu.
• Web, iOS fi Android hunda irratti improvements ship.
• Founder waliin architecture fi product direction irratti hojjechuu.
• Stack keessatti areas high-impact own: messaging, voice, video, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Jalqabaa join — user base scale dura.

about.title: About Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia messenger multilingual fiicamaa end-to-end encryption, instant translation fi voice/video yaada qaba. Mission keenya salphaa: namoota walitti dhufe — fiicamaa, privacy fi afaan gara gara.

values.control: Fiicuu: Ergaa haa dhabatu & read receipts optional.
values.privacy_aria: Privacy jalqabaa: E2E encryption akkaataa jalqabaa.
values.control_aria: Fiicuu: Ergaa haa dhabatu fi read receipts optional.

about.howDescription: Ergaa gadget kee irratti encrypt ta'ee ba'u dura. Hiikuu, backups fi device sync servers keenya daataa agarsiisuu minimize gochuuf design ta'e.

advertise.title: Chatforia waliin Advertise
advertise.description: Engaged messaging users brand-safe placements waliin dhaqqabuu. Banner inventory high-visibility spots, sponsorships fi house promos qabna. Premium subscribers ads hin argaan.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Google AdSense waliin inventory qabna. Publisher ID {{pubId}} waliin Chatforia target gochuu dandeessa ykn form jalaa direct sponsorships.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Google AdSense waliin inventory qabna. Direct sponsorships jira — form jalaa fayyadami.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Ad inventory keenya finalizing jirra. Campaign kee nu haasa'i placements recommend gochuuf.

why.highSession: Session frequency fi dwell time guddaa chat UI keessatti
why.sponsoredMoments: Sponsored moments (e.g., “Start a Chat” modal) jira
why.deals: Direct deals ykn programmatic AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Galataa! Inquiry kee gara jira. Yeroo gabaabaa booda deebisa.
form.successToast: Galataa! Yeroo gabaabaa booda walitti dhufe.
form.mailtoInfo: Email client kee banaa inquiry erguuf…
